abilities.name: Quick Study
abilities.text: This model gains the keywords of the friendly leader.

abilities.name: Tempting Fate
abilities.text: Once per game. When a friendly master is killed, this model may drain two (soulstone). If it does so, deal 4 irreducible damage to this model, then the friendly master heals 4.

actions.name: Wrath of the Woods
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (-) if the target is more than 4" from this model.

triggers.name: Drink Blood
triggers.text: When resolving, this model heals an amount equal to the damage suffered by the target.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Quicksand
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must each pass a TN 13 Sp duel or gain a Staggered token.

actions.name: Quaking Soil
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. Place the target anywhere within 3" of its current location.

triggers.name: Malifaux Born
triggers.text: The target gains an Adaptable token.

triggers.name: Shifted
triggers.text: Choose an enemy model within range. The chosen model must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or this model may place it anywhere within range.
